metrics.label: Agency — named a consequence from a choice
Combat clarity — diplomacy or dice log clear
Immersion — opened journal without being told

globalNotes: Okay what the fuck is with all these checklisted options.... you are getting way to ahead of yourself for what you think is testable easily and complete to do that. tons of shit not looking right and the world is flat and stale, no life, idk if we need to redesign the engine, but this is shit a little
